requirements.task_name: Book the cheapest Family Night visit between Dec 10–20 starting 5–7 pm for 2 adults and 2 children
requirements.task_description: Find Family Night tickets between December 10 and 20 that start between 5:00–7:00 pm, sort by total family price, and add the cheapest available session for 2 adults and 2 children to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Create a 3-activity family itinerary on Dec 18 with Santa visit, light show, and indoor craft between 4–8 pm
requirements.task_description: Use the schedule to build an itinerary on December 18 that includes one Santa activity, one light show, and one indoor craft workshop, all between 4:00–8:00 pm, and add them to the user's itinerary.

requirements.task_name: Find wheelchair-accessible entrance and viewing area and contact the accessibility team
requirements.task_description: Locate information about the main wheelchair-accessible entrance and at least one accessible viewing area, then send a message to the accessibility team using the on-site contact form about wheelchair availability at that entrance.

requirements.task_name: Select a sensory-friendly morning visit next Saturday with child ticket at or under $15 and add 1 adult and 1 child ticket to cart
requirements.task_description: Find a sensory-friendly morning session on the next listed Saturday, choose the first morning time slot (starting before 10:00 am) that offers a child ticket priced at $15 or less, and add 1 adult and 1 child ticket for that session to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Create an evening group booking for 15 people on a Friday after 8 pm with a group discount and pay-on-arrival option
requirements.task_description: Use the group booking section to find a Friday time slot after 8:00 pm that offers a group discount for 15 visitors, select the cheapest such option, choose a pay-on-arrival–type payment method, and proceed to the finalization step.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to the holiday newsletter with weekly updates about family activities and special offers
requirements.task_description: Open the newsletter signup form from the site, select only the 'Family Activities' and 'Special Offers & Discounts' interest categories, choose weekly frequency, fill in contact details, and submit the subscription.

requirements.task_name: Choose between General Admission and VIP Holiday Package based on free drink perk and total price for 2 adults under $120
requirements.task_description: Compare the 'General Admission' and 'VIP Holiday Package' ticket types by checking their included perks and adult prices, then add 2 adult tickets of the option that includes at least one free drink and keeps the total cost for 2 adults under $120; if both or neither meet this, select the cheaper option under $120.

requirements.task_name: Find a suitable late-night bus route and send a transportation question via the site’s contact form
requirements.task_description: Use the 'Getting Here' section to identify a bus route whose stop is within a 10-minute walk and runs until at least 10:00 pm, then send a message via the site's contact form asking about the last departure time for that specific route.
